---

Okay, you've done it. Now you have a draft of your Y statement. Before you move on to complete part three, we recommend taking some time away from the course to live with your Y, to get it into your bones. Try putting your Y statement in places you look at every day. For instance, write it on a few sticky notes and put it on your mirror, your nightstand or your desk. Find opportunities to share your Y in conversations, like when you're sitting on a plane next to a stranger. We do that a lot. Indeed we do. Previously, you've had to rely on your gut. Now that your Y is in words, it will be easier to see where you're already living your Y and where there's an opportunity to do more. In part three, we'll show you how to further refine your Y statement. We'll also explore the rest of your golden circle and help you define your house so that the things you say and the things you do are in alignment with what you believe. So you've now completed part two. Take a moment to reflect on your journey and thank your partner for helping you discover your Y. See you soon.
